stdout:
Table	Create Table
qb_payment_syncs	CREATE TABLE `qb_payment_syncs` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `qbInvoiceId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `invoiceNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `customerPhone` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `customerName` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `pointsCalculated` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','success','failed','duplicate') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `customerId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `errorMessage` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `webhookEventId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `processedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=510001
